ItacPersonItem.Notes: Bernardi was the author of a treatise on duel, Monomachia (1562). According to Tiraboschi, Biblioteca modenese, vol. I (Modena, 1781), when he died the Accademici Storditi of Bologna organized his funeral in San Petronio. See his biography by Paola Zambelli in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
